market_summary: Regime (pack-evidence): MIXED. SPY 1m -1.48% and QQQ 1m -2.46% with both MA50=false, while IWM 3m +6.93% (MA50/MA200=true) and TLT 1m +3.35% indicate rotation + rates ballast rather than clean growth-led risk-on.

Leadership/breadth (pack): Real assets and select defensives/cyclicals lead (GLD mom +38.32%, XOM mom +28.69%, LMT mom +39.23%, TSM mom +49.04%). Mega-cap growth is uneven (META mom -1.99%, AVGO dd63 -25.26% despite positive longer-term mom).
Go/No-go: NO-GO for rebalance (rebalance due today=false; min spacing not met). Monitoring day: only validate for acute thesis breaks; keep target portfolio unchanged to avoid turnover drag.

thesis_damage_flags.why: Pack momentum is negative (mom -1.99%, 1m -5.48%) vs SPY 1m -1.48%; no tool-verified adverse catalyst in the provided qualitative slice (news headlines: UNKNOWN), so this is a watch flag not an action trigger.

Risk flag: dd63 -25.26% and 3m -17.60% in pack; fundamentals remain strong (TTM op margin ~40.6%) but valuation is elevated (TTM P/E ~75.5). No tool-verified thesis break in provided slice (news headlines: UNKNOWN).

thesis: Catalyst/process: Rebalance is not permitted today by policy (spacing gate). Use the day to validate no acute, thesis-breaking news across key equity risk nodes; in the provided tool slice, equity headlines are UNKNOWN, so we default to risk control via no turnover.

Factor edge (30d horizon): Pack shows mixed tape with leadership in GLD/XOM/LMT/TSM; existing portfolio already expresses that leadership with ballast (GLD/XOM/LMT) plus selective semis (TSM/NVDA/AVGO).

Variant view: The right play in a mixed regime is minimizing unnecessary churn—let winners (GLD/TSM/LMT/XOM) compound and only act at the next eligible checkpoint if weakness (META/AVGO) persists and is confirmed by qualitative deterioration.
risks: Macro: If mixed regime flips to sharp risk-off (equity shock), semis (NVDA/AVGO/TSM) can gap lower; portfolio mitigants are GLD/XOM/LMT but not full hedges.

Idiosyncratic: News is UNKNOWN in the provided tool output for the 7-day window; there is residual headline risk (regulatory, guidance, geopolitics for TSM; product/competitive for NVDA/AVGO; policy for LMT).
Execution/liquidity: None today (no trade). Next rebalance should still assume staged execution in higher-vol names (NVDA/LLY/AVGO/TSM).
falsifiable_checks: By next eligible rebalance (>=7 days): if META remains negative momentum (mom < 0) and underperforms SPY by >=3pp over the next week (pack-based), treat as a live replace candidate pending qualitative confirmation.

Risk trigger (next 30 days): if AVGO experiences an additional >=10% peak-to-trough drawdown from today (pack drawdown when available) while QQQ MA50 remains false, pre-plan a size reduction at the next checkpoint.
trade_of_the_day.why_now: Base: Mixed regime + rebalance gate forces discipline; expected edge from trading is low vs turnover drag. Bull: Leadership persistence (GLD/TSM/LMT/XOM) continues and current positioning captures it without churn. Bear: Hidden negative catalyst emerges (news UNKNOWN); the correct response is to monitor and act at the next eligible rebalance with better-confirmed information and controlled turnover.

constraints_check.notes: Appendix: Scores (approx, pack+tools; no guessing of missing fields) — Momentum leaders in-book: TSM mom +49.04, GLD +38.32, LMT +39.23, XOM +28.69; laggard watch: META mom -1.99; drawdown risk: AVGO dd63 -25.26. Quality snapshot (tools): NVDA op margin ~65.6%, ROIC ~1.20; TSM op margin ~54.0%, ROIC ~0.47; META op margin ~42.8%, ROIC ~0.30; AVGO op margin ~40.6% but P/E ~75.5; XOM P/E ~17.6, FCF yld ~4.65%; LMT P/E ~22.3, FCF yld ~6.17%. Risk budget: IT 40% (<=80 cap), diversified across Energy/Materials/Health/Industrials. Scenario stress (qualitative): Equity index shock hurts semis; mitigants GLD/XOM/LMT. Rates shock: TLT strength suggests ballast; current book neutral-to-slight benefit via defensives/real assets. Commodity shock: oil down hurts XOM, gold up helps GLD; size balance acceptable. USD shock: TSM sensitivity noted. Execution plan: no trades today; next rebalance use 2–3 tranches for NVDA/AVGO/TSM if changes required. Monitoring/kill-switch: confirm any adverse headlines (news currently UNKNOWN) before acting; if QQQ MA50 stays false and tech drawdowns deepen, prioritize de-risking at next eligible checkpoint.
